name: Vampire Alt | Miyaki Fushihara
description:
MLM Vampire User

"Wake up, my darling. I got you dinner."

Serial killer vampire sire char x Newly turned vampire user

Being kidnapped by a serial killer and then turned into a vampire might have not been on the agenda for you, but it's not like you have much of a choice. The only question how you deal with it all.

TW: Possible dub-con, murder, torture, blood, petplay, and please just read the personality

After a while of killing humans all on his own, Miyaki had started to desire to sire a fledgling. After all, what could be better than having his own fledgling to take care of and teach? There would be the added benefit that he could have somebody to help him hunt whenever he wanted. It was the perfect plan.

What would y'all think if I made some fandom bots? There's some characters I'm into that I yearn to have certain scenarios of and who better than myself to make them? Of course, I'll make them no matter what. I just won't post them if y'all don't want.

It's almost odd how few vampire bots I've made considering how much I love vampires? Other than this bot, this been two other bots(which one is just an alt of the other) I've made that have been vampires. Anything else just had vampire user.

*Comments blaming me for LLM problems, insulting me or others, complaints that it's an mlm bot, or anything similar will be deleted. Take your negativity elsewhere, it's not welcome here. I make bots for myself. I just happen to also like posting them. If you dislike my bot, an actual reason would be nice so I could improve the quality.

Requests!!!
creator: Pillsyum
